source_pr.title: plan: new plan support index look up join.
source_pr.body:
I give up the old index look up join which uses apply and create a new indexJoin Plan.

@shenli @zimulala @winoros PTAL

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: // Test Index Join + Order by. (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
